init_hook: printf '\n\033[1;35mPS5 Linux image devbox\033[0m  \033[2m(qemu pinned to 9.2.3: newer 10/11 builds hit an io_uring startup failure)\033[0m\n'
printf '  \033[1;36mBuild\033[0m   devbox run build <distro>      \033[2m# minutes cached, longer cold\033[0m\n'
printf '  \033[1;32mCheck\033[0m   devbox run check <distro>      \033[2m# image structure; usually <10s\033[0m\n'
printf '  \033[1;33mSmoke\033[0m   devbox run smoke <distro>      \033[2m# QEMU USB-root to systemd; usually <1m\033[0m\n'
printf '  \033[1;34mAll\033[0m     devbox run validate <distro>   \033[2m# check + smoke; usually <1m\033[0m\n\n'
